libraries.name: clients
libraries.description: EigenDA V2 gRPC client implementations for relay (GetBlob/GetChunks) and validator node (StoreChunks/GetChunks) communication used by api-server

libraries.name: api
libraries.description: Protobuf/gRPC generated code and typed client/server wrappers for all EigenDA protocols (disperser v1/v2, node dispersal/retrieval, relay, encoder, controller)

libraries.name: common
libraries.description: Foundational shared utilities: EthClient with multi-homing failover, AWS DynamoDB/S3/KMS clients, rate limiting (leaky bucket), LRU/FIFO caches, replay attack guard, structured logging, config parsing

libraries.name: core
libraries.description: Central domain model: blob/batch types, BLS BN254 cryptography, BLS signature aggregation (StdSignatureAggregator), stake-proportional chunk assignment (v1+v2), shard validation (KZG+Merkle), Ethereum contract bindings, payment accounting (Meterer), signing rate tracking, TheGraph indexed chain state

libraries.name: crypto
libraries.description: Low-level BN254 elliptic curve utilities and field arithmetic used by the encoding library (gnark-crypto wrappers)

libraries.name: disperser
libraries.description: Core dispersal subsystem library: v1 BlobStore/Batcher/EncodingStreamer/Dispatcher/TransactionManager/Finalizer, v2 DispersalServerV2/EncodingManager/Controller/BlobMetadataStore(DynamoDB)/BlobStore(S3), DataAPI server (Gin REST), payment metering

libraries.name: ejector
libraries.description: Operator ejection tooling: builds and submits ejection transactions against EigenDAEjectionManager, monitors pending ejection states

libraries.name: encoding
libraries.description: KZG polynomial commitment + Reed-Solomon erasure coding engine: BN254 field-element codec, FFT, RS encoder/decoder, KZG committer/prover (FK20 amortized multi-proofs), KZG verifier (universal batch), Gnark (CPU) and Icicle (GPU/CUDA) backends, SRS point I/O

libraries.name: indexer
libraries.description: Ethereum event log subscriber for operator BLS key registrations and socket updates; populates in-memory indexed operator state

libraries.name: litt
libraries.description: LittDB: EigenDA's custom append-only key-value store for DA node chunk storage. Write-once/read-many, TTL expiry, horizontal sharding, LRU write/read caches, LevelDB keymap, in-memory memTable for tests

libraries.name: node
libraries.description: DA validator node logic: StoreChunks gRPC handler (auth, payment, relay download, KZG validation, LittDB storage, BLS sign), GetChunks retrieval, operator registration/deregistration (churner), EjectionSentinel, payment validators (reservation + on-demand)

libraries.name: operators
libraries.description: Operator state management: indexed operator set queries (TheGraph + chain fallback), quorum scanning, socket resolution, LRU-cached operator lookups

libraries.name: relay
libraries.description: Relay gRPC server: blob/chunk serving with LRU byte-weighted FIFO caches, two-level token-bucket rate limiting (global + per-client), BLS request authentication, ChunkReader/ChunkWriter (S3 range-aware partial downloads)

libraries.name: retriever
libraries.description: Blob retrieval client library: fetches and decodes blobs from DA node operators, supports both relay and direct validator retrieval paths

libraries.name: @eigenda/contracts
libraries.description: EigenDA core contracts JavaScript/TypeScript package: ABI exports, deployment artifacts, type-safe bindings for Go/TS/Rust consumers

libraries.name: eigenda-batch-metadata
libraries.description: The Graph subgraph indexing EigenDA v1 batch metadata (BatchConfirmed events, batch header hashes) for off-chain querying

libraries.name: eigenda-operator-state
libraries.description: The Graph subgraph indexing EigenDA operator BLS public keys, quorum registrations, socket addresses, and stake changes for indexed operator state

libraries.name: eigenda-payments
libraries.description: The Graph subgraph indexing EigenDA payment events (reservations, on-demand deposits) from PaymentVault for payment state queries

libraries.name: eigenda-subgraphs
libraries.description: Monorepo root for all EigenDA The Graph subgraph deployments (batch-metadata, operator-state, payments)

libraries.name: eigenda-ethereum
libraries.description: Rust Ethereum RPC bridge for EigenDA verification: resolves contract addresses from EigenDADirectory, fans out 8 parallel eth_getProof calls to build CertStateData for eigenda-verification

libraries.name: eigenda-verification
libraries.description: Pure Rust cert verification library: Merkle blob inclusion, blob version validation, BLS multi-sig pairing check (arkworks BN254), KZG commitment recomputation, quorum stake threshold enforcement. Used in rollup derivation pipelines and ZK-VMs

libraries.name: eigenda-srs-data
libraries.description: Compile-time embedded KZG Structured Reference String: 524,288 BN254 G1 points (~16 MiB) baked into the binary via include_bytes!, zero-copy LazyLock<SRS> for KZG commitment recomputation

libraries.name: eigenda-proxy
libraries.description: Rust HTTP client for the EigenDA proxy server: store_payload (POST /put) and get_encoded_payload (GET /get/{cert}), exponential backoff retries, RLP StandardCommitment parsing

libraries.name: eigenda-tests
libraries.description: E2E integration test harness for the Rust SDK; spawns Anvil local Ethereum node via testcontainers, exercises full eigenda-ethereum + eigenda-verification pipeline

applications.name: api-server
applications.description: EigenDA Proxy: HTTP sidecar for rollups implementing OP-stack ALT-DA and Arbitrum Nitro Custom DA interfaces. Handles blob PUT (disperse) and GET (retrieve+verify) with S3 secondary cache and on-chain cert verification.

applications.name: disperser-apiserver
applications.description: Primary external-facing gRPC ingest for EigenDA v2 blobs. Validates requests (ECDSA, KZG commitment, payment timestamps), calls Controller for payment authorization, stores blobs in S3+DynamoDB, returns Queued blobKey.

applications.name: disperser-batcher
applications.description: v1 legacy EigenDA pipeline: EncodingStreamer polls DynamoDB for Processing blobs, sends to encoder gRPC, Batcher assembles batches, Dispatcher fans StoreChunks to operators, AggregateSignatures, TxnManager submits confirmBatch on-chain, Finalizer marks Finalized.

applications.name: disperser-blobapi
applications.description: Combined binary co-hosting DispersalServerV2 + Relay gRPC server in a single process for simplified deployment. Both services share AWS credentials and Ethereum connectivity.

applications.name: disperser-controller
applications.description: v2 control-plane orchestrator: EncodingManager encodes Queued blobs via encoder gRPC, Controller assembles Merkle-tree batches, fans StoreChunks to all DA validators, signatureReceiver aggregates BLS sigs, PaymentAuthorizationHandler validates payments, exposes AuthorizePayment gRPC API.

applications.name: disperser-dataapi
applications.description: Read-only observability HTTP API (Gin): blob feed/status/attestation, batch feed, operator dispersal/signing stats, network metrics (via Prometheus), payment reservation data, account feeds. Multi-layer LRU caching.

applications.name: disperser-encoder
applications.description: Standalone KZG/RS encoding gRPC service. v1: receives raw bytes, encodes inline, returns commitments+chunks. v2: fetches blob from S3, KZG/RS encodes, writes proofs+coefficients to S3 ChunkStore, returns FragmentInfo. Supports GPU/Icicle backend.

applications.name: core
applications.description: Core EigenDA Solidity contracts: EigenDAServiceManager (v1 batch confirmation + BLS threshold check), PaymentVault (reservations + on-demand ETH deposits), EigenDADirectory (V3 service discovery), EigenDAThresholdRegistry (quorum security params), EigenDARelayRegistry, EigenDADisperserRegistry, EigenDARegistryCoordinator, EigenDAAccessControl.

applications.name: integrations
applications.description: Versioned EigenDA cert verifier contracts: EigenDACertVerifier (V4, current), EigenDACertVerifierRouter (ABN-based dispatch to active verifier), legacy V1/V2 verifiers, CertVerifierRouterFactory. checkDACert returns status codes (not revert) for ZK-VM compatibility.

applications.name: periphery
applications.description: EigenDAEjectionManager: three-phase optimistic operator ejection (startEjection/cancelEjection/completeEjection) with delay window, cooldown enforcement, BLS self-cancel signature support.

aws-dynamodb.name: AWS DynamoDB
aws-dynamodb.description: Primary metadata store for blob lifecycle state machines (v1: Processing/Dispersing/Confirmed/Finalized, v2: Queued/Encoded/GatheringSignatures/Complete/Failed), batch headers, BlobCertificates, inclusion proofs, attestations, dispersal requests/responses, payment metering (reservations + on-demand ledgers), signing rate history

aws-s3.name: AWS S3
aws-s3.description: Object storage for raw blob bytes (blobs/<blobKey>) and encoded KZG frame data (proofs + RS coefficients in ChunkStore). Also used by api-server for secondary payload cache (keccak(cert) -> payload).

aws-kms.name: AWS KMS
aws-kms.description: Hardware-managed Ethereum transaction signing via secp256k1. Used by disperser-batcher (confirmBatch tx signing) in production deployments as an alternative to plaintext private keys.

ethereum-rpc.name: Ethereum RPC (JSON-RPC / WebSocket)
ethereum-rpc.description: Ethereum node connectivity for: reading on-chain state (quorum parameters, operator BLS keys, stake, payment vaults), submitting transactions (confirmBatch, operator registration), event log subscription, eth_getProof for CertStateData assembly, eth_call for cert verification.

thegraph.name: The Graph
thegraph.description: Indexed Ethereum event data via three GraphQL subgraphs: eigenda-operator-state (BLS keys, quorum membership, sockets), eigenda-batch-metadata (v1 batch hashes), eigenda-payments (reservation/on-demand payment events). Used by controller, batcher, relay, and dataapi to avoid scanning raw Ethereum events.

prometheus.name: Prometheus
prometheus.description: Metrics backend queried by disperser-dataapi for PromQL range queries (blob throughput timeseries, network signing rate timeseries). All services also expose a /metrics endpoint for Prometheus scraping.
